name: Conversation Orchestration
description: Coordinates privacy analysis, model selection, optional context retrieval, chat generation, and encrypted persistence.
guardrails: Run Privacy Radar before external model routes.
Persist chat messages in SQLCipher storage.
Persist assistant responses as Adaptive Artifact blocks before final SSE done.
acceptance_checks: Chat response includes conversation_id and privacy_level.
First token is streamed over SSE for streaming requests.
Assistant messages link to artifact_id when a response artifact is created.
No external destination is used without consent.
